x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Rate Credit Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Interest or repayment is calculated on a fixed principal or fixed rate.

Comment:
Example: Loan interest of 5% per year on the original principal.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reducing Balance Credit Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Interest is calculated on the outstanding principal, which reduces as repayments are made.

Comment:
Example: Home loan where interest decreases as principal is paid down.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Proportional Credit Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Charges or repayments calculated as a percentage of a reference value.

Comment:
Example: 3% of outstanding credit limit charged monthly as service fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Credit Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Different rates or amounts applied depending on thresholds or ranges.

Comment:
Example: Credit card interest: 1% on first €1,000, 2% on the next €2,000.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Time-Based Credit Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Amounts accrue over time based on duration.

Comment:
Example: Interest accrues daily and is posted monthly.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Credit Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Calculations triggered only under specific conditions or events.

Comment:
Example: Penalty interest applied if repayment is late.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cap Credit Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Calculated amount is limited to a maximum value.

Comment:
Example: Monthly interest capped at €100 regardless of outstanding balance.
